prompt: Implement a balanced BST (AVL tree) with insert, search, and delete using TDD. Include tree height balancing.

turns.content:
<task>
Implement a balanced BST (AVL tree) with insert, search, and delete using TDD. Include tree height balancing.
</task>

arguments.summary: Project has src/ and tests/ directories. Will implement AVL tree with TDD — tests first covering insert, search, delete, and auto-balancing.

arguments.content:
import pytest
from src.avl import AVLTree

def test_insert_and_search():
    tree = AVLTree()
    tree.insert(10)
    tree.insert(5)
    tree.insert(15)
    assert tree.search(10) is True
    assert tree.search(5) is True
    assert tree.search(99) is False

def test_inorder_traversal():
    tree = AVLTree()
    for v in [30, 10, 20, 50, 40]:
        tree.insert(v)
    assert tree.inorder() == [10, 20, 30, 40, 50]

def test_height_balanced_after_insert():
    tree = AVLTree()
    # Inserting sorted sequence would unbalance naive BST
    for v in [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]:
        tree.insert(v)
    # AVL should keep height at most log2(7)+1 = 3
    assert tree.height() <= 3

def test_delete():
    tree = AVLTree()
    for v in [10, 5, 15, 3, 7]:
        tree.insert(v)
    tree.delete(5)
    assert tree.search(5) is False
    assert tree.search(3) is True
    assert tree.search(7) is True
    assert tree.inorder() == [3, 7, 10, 15]

def test_delete_root():
    tree = AVLTree()
    tree.insert(10)
    tree.insert(5)
    tree.insert(15)
    tree.delete(10)
    assert tree.search(10) is False
    result = tree.inorder()
    assert 5 in result and 15 in result

arguments.final_answer:
Implemented AVL tree with TDD:
- src/avl.py: AVLTree with insert (auto-balance via rotations), search, delete (with successor replacement and rebalance), inorder traversal, and height query. Supports left/right/left-right/right-left rotations.
- tests/test_avl.py: 5 tests covering insert+search, inorder correctness, height balance (sorted inserts stay height 3), delete non-root node, delete root node.
All 5 tests pass.
